meaning: n.漂白剂adj.有脱色作用的,漂白的
examples: Useage: Mordant agent, water repellent, oil decolorant. It is also used in leather and paper industries.
Food products are used as acid neutralizer and peeling agent, decolorant and deodorant in the foodstuff industry.
The color in different ages and parts of bamboo wood was analysed, and the decolorant effect of bamboo wood from treating with H_2O_2 was also tested.
